ここが師匠の家だよ……はぁ。<br>たどり着いてしまった……: This is Master's house... *pant*. We actually made it...
ますますテンションが下がってるな……: Your mood's dropping even more, huh...
ここにたどり着くだけでも散々手間が必要だっただろう？<br>それで余計にげんなり:
It took a hell of a lot of effort just to get here, you know? That's why
I'm even more sick of it.
一定距離ごとに特定の薬品を地面に垂らし、認識阻害の結界を<br>一時的に解除して:
So every so often you have to drop a specific chemical on the ground
to temporarily disable the perception-blocking barrier before the place even shows up... huh. Really is a secret hideout.
たとえ軍が攻め入っても、この家は見つからないだろうね。: Even if the army attacked, they'd never find this place, I bet.
お前の師匠はかなり優れた魔術師なんだな。: Your master's a pretty amazing mage, huh.
ああ。魔術の腕前「は」すごいんだ、確かに。<br>他はすべて最悪だけど。:
Yeah. His magical ability is amazing, no doubt. But everything else
about him is the worst.
心の底から嫌そうだが、入らないのか？: You look like you really don't want to, but aren't you going in?
目の前まで来るとなぁ……忌まわしき記憶たちが……くぅぅ……！:
Now that I'm actually here... all those grim memories come flooding
back... urrgh...!
さて、じゃあノックの代わりに爆薬を投げ込むとしようか♪:
Alright, now how about I toss in some explosives instead of
knocking?♪
森林火災を起こすのはやめてくれ……。<br>ほら、行くぞ。: Don't start a forest fire... Come on, let's go.
……やっぱり結界を解除した時点で、来たことはバレバレかー。:
...Figures. The moment we dropped the barrier, he knew we were
coming.
えーと、師匠……お久しぶりで――: Umm, Master... it's been a while—
こういうときは「ただいま」じゃろう？: At a time like this, it's "I'm home" that's proper, I reckon.
いつの間にフレデリカの背後に……！？: When did he get behind her!?
気配を消す薬の効果じゃよ、ほっほっ。: It is the effect of the presence-hiding potion, Hoho.
しかしフレデリカよ、随分と久しぶりじゃのう。相変わらず<br>真っ白でなめらかな:
But Frederica, it has been a good long time. As always, you have that
lovely, fair, smooth skin.
……なるほど、こういうことか。: I see... So that's how it is.
うむうむ、年を重ねてまた一段と味わいがげふぅぅ！？: Mmm, mmm, aged to perfection, the flavor is—*gurk*!
久々に顔を見せた弟子の首を速攻で舐めるとか、<br>一体どういう神経をしてるんだ:
You show up after so long and immediately lick your apprentice's
neck! What kind of perverted old man are you!
恥を知れっ！！ このっ！ このっ！！ ぜっころ！！: Shame on you! You! You! Take that!
げふっ！ がふっ！？ くぅぅ……中々良い蹴りじゃのう……！<br>もし、そこの若:
Oof! *gasp*! *groan*... That is a pretty good kick...! Hey, you there,
young man. If you could stop this beast soon—
ぐおおおお！？ おぬしも加勢するとは……中々の鬼畜じゃな、<br>ほっほっほ……:
Gwaaaah! You are joining in too... Quite the sadist you are, Hohoho...
Ow, ow, ow, ow, ow!
ありがとう。一緒にこの淫獣を滅しよう。: Thanks. Let's destroy this lecherous beast together.
おお、フレデリカ……いつからそんな、<br>ゴミを見るような素敵な表情が出来るよ:
Oh, Frederica... Since when did you learn to make such a wonderful
'looking at trash' expression—owowowowow!
ちょ、あのっ、さすがに一旦やめてくれんか……っ！: Hey, um, can you just take a break already...!
……さて、何か聞きたいことがあるんじゃろう？<br>話を聞こうではないか、愛弟子:
...Well now, I imagine you have something to ask? Let us talk, my
beloved apprentice and Lord Commander.
それだけボコボコになっておいて、<br>よく平然と仕切り直せるな……:
You get the crap knocked out of you and still calmly change the
subject...
……って、あれ？ どうしてこの人が司令官だって分かるんだ？<br>まだ名乗ってな:
...Wait, huh? How'd you know he's the Commander? We haven't even
told you...
前線基地の話はこの辺境の地にも届いておる。<br>そして若く優れた司令官殿の噂も:
Word of the Frontline Base has reached even this remote land. And
rumors of a young and skilled Lord Commander as well.
森に入った時点で、おぬしらの姿はこの水晶で捉えていた。<br>理知的な佇まいから:
I saw you through this crystal as you entered the forest. Your
intelligent demeanor showed me you were the Lord Commander.
水晶で俺たちを……？ やはり貴方は相当優れた術師なんだな。:
You were watching us through the crystal...? You really are an
incredibly skilled mage.
それだけ認めてくれとるのなら、<br>ボコるにしてももう少し手加減をしてほしかっ:
If you acknowledge me that much, I wish you'd gone a little easier on
me when you were beating me up...
ところで師匠。その水晶は初めて目にしたんだが……<br>まさかよからぬことに使っ:
By the way, Master. That's the first time I've seen that crystal... You
haven't been using it for anything dirty, have you?
使っておらん使っておらん。……いや、ほんとじゃからな？<br>笑顔で圧をかけるの:
I'm not using it, I'm not! It's the truth! Stop putting on the pressure
with that smile, my beloved apprentice.
それじゃあ本題に移ろう。フレデリカには話しづらい内容だから、<br>俺から説明さ:
Alright, let's move on to the main issue. This is hard for Frederica to
talk about, so let me explain. The truth is—
ふむ……中々おいし……厄介な状況じゃのう。: Hmm, a most pleasant— I mean, perilous situation, indeed.
今『おいしい』と言いかけたか……？: Hold on, you nearly said 'pleasant' just now, didn't you?
フレデリカ、手を出すのは話を聞いてからにしておけ。: Frederica, hold off on attacking until we've heard what he has to say.
俺は……貴方がフレデリカにかけた何かしらの魔法や呪いが<br>原因だと思っている:
I think it's because of some spell or curse you cast on Frederica.
What do you think?
ほっほっほ。さてさて、どうじゃったかのう。: Ho ho ho. Well now, I wonder about that.
えぇと、持ってきた爆薬はこれで全部かな……: Let's see... Is this all the explosives I brought?
……真実を話さねば命が危なそうなので白状しよう。<br>実は、えっちな魔術をかけ:
...It seems my life is in danger if I don't tell the truth, so I'll confess.
I did try to cast pervy magic on her.
やっぱり師匠が原因なんじゃ……って、あれ？<br>『かけようとした』って……？:
So it is you after all, Master... Wait, huh? 'Tried to'? What do you
mean?
えっちな魔術はすべて弾かれていたんじゃよ。<br>幾度もかけたにも関わらず、な。: All the pervy magic was deflected. Even though I cast it many times.
これは仮説の域を出ない話じゃが……フレデリカはおそらく、<br>生まれつき強力な:
This is just a hypothesis, but it seems Frederica has been protected
since birth by a powerful succubus's secret technique.
うぇぇぇ……？ 私に……淫魔の秘術……？<br>しかも生まれつき……？: Eww...? Me... a succubus's secret technique...? And from birth...?
そ、そんな馬鹿な話……あってたまるか！<br>パパもママも人間だぞ！: Th-there's no way that's true! My Papa and Mama are both human!
パパとママと呼んでるのか。可愛いな。: You call them Papa and Mama? That's cute.
ううううるさい！ 大事なのはそこじゃないだろう！: *urgh*, shut up! That's not the point!
とにかく……何を言ってるんだ師匠は！？: Anyway... what are you saying, Master?
様々な強度のえっちな魔法をかけ続け、そのすべてを<br>弾かれた上での推測じゃ！:
I kept casting erotic magic of various intensities on ye, and that's my
guess after all of 'em were deflected! How's that for—*wheeze*!
びっくりすることが多すぎて聞き流してたけど、<br>聞き捨てならないことを言って:
There were so many surprises I was letting 'em slide, but you said
something I can't ignore!
えっちな魔法を私に何度もかけていたとはどういうことだぁぁ！？: What do you mean you kept casting erotic magic on me!?
（生まれつきの淫魔の秘術が施されている……か。<br>となれば、考えられる原因は:
(So she's had the succubus secret technique since birth... If so, the
possible cause is...)
フレデリカ。目的は果たせたし、そろそろお暇しよう。: Frederica. We've got what we came for, so let's take our leave.
む……そうか。せっかく師匠をボコるのも楽しくなって<br>きたところだったんだけ: Hmph... I guess. I was just starting to enjoy beating you up, Master...
おお、愛弟子が危うい性癖に目覚めかけておる……。<br>しかし……本当に成長した:
Oh, my beloved apprentice is on the verge of awakening to dangerous
tastes... But... you've really grown, Frederica.
もし事態が解決しなかったら、また来なさい。<br>わしが対策を考えるとしよう。:
If the situation ain't resolved, come again. I'll think up a
countermeasure.
で、でも、えっちなものしか作れないんだぞ……？: B-but you can only make pervy stuff...?
なぁに、それらの成分をまたいじくって、<br>実戦に使えるようにだってできるさ。:
Pshaw, I can tinker with those ingredients and make 'em
combat-ready. Who do ye think I am?
そろそろ泣きそうじゃ……。<br>これがわしの背負いし業というやつか……: I'm about to cry... So this is the burden I've gotta bear...
単に今までのセクハラの積み重ねというだけの話だと思うが……:
I think it's just the accumulated sexual harassment from all these
years...
でも……そうか、解決しなくてもやりようはある……って<br>思えるだけでも、かな:
But... I see. Even if it's not resolved, there's a way... Just knowing
that makes me feel a lot better.
おお、愛弟子よ……！<br>どれどれ、別れる前に濃厚ハグを……:
Oh, my beloved apprentice...! Now then, how about a big hug before
we part...?
ボディブローを入れた上でまったく同じスマイルとは……<br>やるな愛弟子よ……！:
A body blow and then the same smile... You're something, beloved
apprentice!
